name: Chic Animal Print Crop-Top for Women
description:

Whether you're heading out for a casual day with friends or looking to elevate your evening look, this versatile crop top pairs effortlessly with high-waisted skirts, jeans, or trousers.

Pattern: All-over Animal Print

Sleeves: Trendy short puff sleeves


Material: Stretchable Lycra fabric with a soft, knitted weave


Fit: Flattering and comfortable cropped silhouette


Occasion: Perfect for casual outings, parties, or everyday wear


 
Sizing & Measurements:
 
This top is available in sizes S, M, and L. Please refer to the measurements below to find your ideal fit.


Size S: Length 14", Chest 34", Waist 26"


Size M: Length 14", Chest 36", Waist 28"


Size L: Length 14", Chest 38", Waist 30"


Note: The half-sleeve length is 8.5" and the shoulder is 14.5" for all sizes.

name: Women's V-Neck Waist Top with Textured Jacquard Print
description:
Step into style with our charming Pink Sleeveless Cropped Top. This trendy and unique top is perfect for adding a touch of elegance to any outfit. It features a stylish V-neck design and a full button-down front, creating a classic vest-inspired look. The fabric has a delicate jacquard-like textured pattern, which adds a subtle, high-end feel.
Made from a soft, lightweight knitted net fabric with a distinctive dot pattern, this top offers a comfortable and breathable fit. The material has a slight stretch, ensuring a great silhouette that's both flattering and comfortable to wear. The sleeveless design makes it ideal for warmer weather or for layering under a jacket.
Pair this versatile crop top with high-waisted skirts, trousers, or jeans for a chic and fashionable look that's perfect for a night out, a casual day, or a special occasion.
 
Features:
 


Color: Light Pink


Style: Sleeveless, V-neck, and button-down front


Material: Soft, lightweight, knitted net fabric


Pattern: Textured dots


Fit: Cropped, comfortable, and flattering


 
Sizing & Measurements:
 
This top is available in sizes S, M, and L. Please refer to the measurements below to find your perfect fit.


Size S: Length 18", Chest 34", Waist 26"


Size M: Length 18", Chest 36", Waist 28"


Size L: Length 18", Chest 38", Waist 30"


Note: The shoulder width is 14.5" for all sizes.
